sourceTitle: Guidance on AI in assessment | UNSW Staff Teaching Gateway
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ensure that any AI-based output is reviewed with all due diligence before being released or relied upon. This is particularly important to ensure that you avoid bias and factual errors in the output.
evidenceLocator: Section 'Key principles of AI usage in assessment'
